final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night Hangzhou self-guided itinerary, with a real Hangzhou map as the central spine, landmark illustrations floating on cardstock panels.

Style/medium: needs a travel-guide booklet aesthetic with illustrated landmark icons — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be tri-fold layout with real Hangzhou map as central spine, 4 day-panels divided clearly, landmark cutouts visually floating above cardstock with shadow depth
Subject: must include all scenic spots and key content across 4 day-panels:
  Day 1 (西湖经典游): 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺
  Day 2 (禅意杭州): 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰造像 / 法喜寺 / 宋城
  Day 3 (九溪烟树): 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径
  Day 4 (文艺收官): 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺 / 西溪湿地 / 深潭口
Scene/backdrop: must be a real Hangzhou map base with routes visually connecting all 4 day-panels and their respective scenic spots
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, inviting travel-brochure atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking classical Jiangnan ink-wash tones blended with modern travel-guide vibrancy — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include paper cardstock cutout treatment with floating drop shadows beneath each landmark illustration
Text (verbatim): must include the following verbatim text blocks placed on corresponding day-panels:
  Day 1 panel: "第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南" / 路线：断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 / ⏰ 建议时间：7:30出发 / 午餐推荐：楼外楼（东坡肉+龙井虾仁），人均150元 / ⚠️ 避坑：租共享单车（每小时5元）
  Day 2 panel: "第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵" / 路线：灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城 / 灵隐寺祈福：请网红十八籽手串（46元） / 《宋城千古情》演出（贵宾席320元） / 晚餐推荐：素描餐厅，人均90元
  Day 3 panel: "第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人" / 路线：九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径 / 龙井问茶（50元/杯） / 晚餐推荐：茶人村（私房桂鱼+香芋煲），人均120元
  Day 4 panel: "第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面" / 方案A：拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺 / 方案B：西溪湿地→深潭口→氦气球俯瞰（180元） / 伴手礼：南宋胡记荷花酥（38元/盒）/ 万事利丝绸方巾（150-300元）
Constraints: must preserve real geographic accuracy of Hangzhou map base; all 4 day-panels must be visible in the unfolded tri-fold view; all scenic spot names preserved; landmark icons must have distinct visual character reflecting each site
Avoid: generic tourist map clip-art; flat non-layered layout without cardstock floating effect
